## X-Sense Home Security v1.2.6.25

### Camera WebRTC
- Sends camera SDP and ICE signal messages as the raw APK-style envelopes.
- Starts live view from the APK data-channel trigger path and tracks the first-frame timeout separately.
- Adds more focused debug context for camera startup failures, including signal events, candidates, startLive state, and websocket close details.

> Camera changes are still being published as prereleases so affected users can test without pushing every attempt as a normal release.
